name: CSV → JSON
desc: Turn CSV into JSON (objects or arrays).

name: JSON → CSV
desc: Turn JSON arrays/objects into CSV.

name: Excel → CSV
desc: Convert .xlsx to CSV (choose sheet).

name: Delimiter Converter
desc: Comma ↔ Tab ↔ Pipe ↔ Semicolon.

name: Sort CSV
desc: Sort by any column ascending/descending.

name: Deduplicate CSV
desc: Remove duplicate rows by key columns.

name: Filter CSV
desc: Filter rows by contains/equals/regex.

name: Merge CSVs (Join)
desc: Join two CSV files by key columns.

name: Validate CSV
desc: Find header issues & jagged rows.

name: CSV → SQL
desc: Generate INSERT statements from CSV.

name: CSV → HTML Table
desc: Generate HTML table markup.

name: CSV → Markdown Table
desc: Generate Markdown table.

name: CSV Transpose
desc: Flip rows and columns (transpose).

name: CSV Pivot / Aggregate
desc: Group by & aggregate numeric columns.

name: CSV Split / Merge Columns
desc: Split a column or merge multiple columns.

name: CSV Date / Number Formatter
desc: Format numbers (decimals/thousands) or dates.

name: UTF‑8 Fixer (Decode)
desc: Re-decode Windows-1252/ISO-8859-1 into UTF‑8.

name: Video Compressor
desc: Compress video (in-browser ffmpeg.wasm).

name: MP4 → MP3
desc: Extract MP3 audio from MP4 in browser.

name: WebP → PNG
desc: Convert WebP to PNG client-side.

name: PNG → WebP
desc: Convert PNG to WebP (quality slider).

name: Amps → kW
desc: Convert current (A) to power (kW). Choose phase and power factor; enter voltage.

name: Amps → kVA
desc: Convert amps to apparent power (kVA).

name: Amps → VA
desc: Convert amps to apparent power (VA).

name: Amps → Volts
desc: Convert amps to volts using Ohm’s Law (V = I × R).

name: Amps → Watts
desc: Convert amps to watts (choose system and PF).

name: Electricity Bill Calculator
desc: Estimate bill from energy use and rate. Enter either direct kWh or device power/time.

name: Energy Consumption Calculator
desc: Compute energy from power and time.

name: Energy Cost Calculator
desc: Estimate cost from device power, time and rate.

name: eV → Volts
desc: Convert energy in electronvolts to equivalent potential difference (for z charges). For a single electron (z=1), 1 eV ↔ 1 V.

name: Joules → Watts
desc: Power is energy per unit time (W = J / s).

name: Joules → Volts
desc: V = J / Q. Enter charge (C) or number of electrons.

name: kVA → Amps
desc: Convert apparent power (kVA) to current (A).

name: kVA → Watts
desc: Convert apparent power to real power using PF: W = kVA × 1000 × PF.

name: kVA → kW
desc: kW = kVA × PF.

name: kVA → VA
desc: VA = kVA × 1000.

name: kW → Amps
desc: Convert real power (kW) to current (A).

name: kW → Volts
desc: Compute volts from kW, current and PF.

name: kW → kWh
desc: Energy = power × time.

name: kW → VA
desc: Apparent power (VA) from real power and PF.

name: kW → kVA
desc: kVA = kW / PF.

name: kWh → kW
desc: Compute average kW from energy and hours.

name: kWh → Watts
desc: Compute average watts from energy and hours.

name: mAh → Wh
desc: Battery capacity conversion: Wh = (mAh × V)/1000.

name: Ohm’s Law Calculator
desc: Enter any two of V, I, R; we’ll compute the third (and power).

name: Power Calculator
desc: Compute real power from common inputs.

name: Power Factor Calculator
desc: PF = kW / kVA = W / VA. We also show the phase angle (cos φ = PF).

name: VA → Amps
desc: Convert VA to current (A).

name: VA → Watts
desc: W = VA × PF.

name: VA → kVA
desc: kVA = VA / 1000.

name: Voltage Divider Calculator
desc: Two-resistor divider: Vout = Vin × R2/(R1+R2). Also shows current.

name: Voltage Drop Calculator
desc: Estimate voltage drop along a round-trip conductor using AWG and material.

name: Volts → Amps
desc: Ohm’s law: I = V / R.

name: Volts → Watts
desc: Compute watts from V and I (with PF/system).

name: Volts → kW
desc: Compute kW from V and I (with PF/system).

name: Volts → Joules
desc: Energy = V × Q. Enter charge in coulombs or number of electrons.

name: Volts → eV
desc: For z charges, eV = z × V.

name: Watts–Volts–Amps–Ohms Calculator
desc: Enter any two independent quantities among V, I, R, P; we’ll compute the rest.

name: Watts → Amps
desc: Convert watts to amps (choose system and PF).

name: Watts → Joules
desc: Energy = power × time.

name: Watts → kWh
desc: Energy (kWh) from watts and hours.

name: Watts → Volts
desc: Compute volts from W, current and PF/system.

name: Watts → VA
desc: VA = W / PF.

name: Wh → mAh
desc: Battery conversion: mAh = (Wh × 1000) / V.

name: Wire Gauge Calculator
desc: Suggest minimum AWG to keep voltage drop below a limit for given current and length (round trip assumed).

name: Wash Sale Calculator
desc: Estimate wash-sale disallowed loss, adjusted basis and holding period.

name: RSU Sell‑to‑Cover Calculator
desc: Figure shares sold for taxes, net shares delivered, and withholding.

name: ISO AMT Credit Carryforward
desc: Compute allowed AMT credit use this year and remaining carryforward.

name: Solo 401k S‑Corp Calculator
desc: Max employee deferral + employer profit‑sharing for S‑Corp W‑2 wages (2025).

name: RSU/ISO/NSO Tax Outcome
desc: Estimate taxes for RSU, ISO, and NSO scenarios (AMT‑aware).

name: Email Extractor
description: Extract and deduplicate email addresses from any text.

name: URL Extractor
description: Extract and deduplicate URLs from any text.

name: Phone Extractor
description: Extract and normalize phone numbers from any text.

name: CSV Template Engine
description: Use a {{column}} template to generate text from CSV rows (bulk meta, descriptions, outreach).
